browser-use.purpose: local browser smoke testing and UX verification, with Playwright harness as the repeatable local default when available

github.purpose: issues, pull requests, review comments, CI, and release workflow

codex-security.purpose: full security scan phases for repository, PR, branch, or diff

google-drive.purpose: Docs, Sheets, and Slides summaries or stakeholder artifacts

notion.purpose: project pages, task databases, and decision logs
